creator: lxv@omut.org
text:
On Thu, May 20, 2010 15:10, Jung-uk Kim wrote:
> It seems the patch is already included since b17 update:
>
> http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?201001161934.o0GJYWwk001711
>
> Please confirm.
>
> Jung-uk Kim

The patch is indeed included in the current
ports/java/openjdk6/files/patch-set:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/java/openjdk6/files/patch-set?rev=1.7

This ticket can be closed. Thank you.
